---
title: "Mapping Voters' Engagement with Political Information Sites: The Case of Voting Advice Applications"
author: "Djouvas, C., Manavopoulos, V., and Mendez, F."
date: 2021-01-01
description: "European Consortium for Political Research General Conference (ECPR 2021)"
categories: [Applied Political Communication]
image: images_publications/conference.png
---
